OVERLAY_HOOK_1: Each time you baptize an excuse as wisdom, you are not growing in discernment, you are growing the loop.
OVERLAY_HOOK_2: Strength in leadership is not built by waiting for the right moment, it is built by surrendering in this one.
OVERLAY_HOOK_3: Vision atrophy is not a spiritual mystery, it is the predictable outcome of choosing delay over obedience.
